moments.title: Scotland vs Morocco in World Cup
moments.blurb: Scotland plays its second FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match against Morocco tonight, kicking off at 11pm BST.

angles.name: Scotland Match Tonight
angles.copy: Tonight's the night for Scotland's second World Cup clash! Can the Tartan Army secure a vital win against Morocco? Kick-off 11pm BST on ITV1.

angles.name: National Scotland Match
angles.copy: The World Cup action continues tonight, and it's a huge one for Scotland! Tune in to ITV1 at 11pm as they face Morocco.

moments.title: England vs Ghana World Cup Clash
moments.blurb: England faces Ghana in their second FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match on Tuesday, June 23rd, live on BBC One.

angles.name: England Match Build-up
angles.copy: Three Lions alert! England is back in World Cup action on Tuesday, taking on Ghana at 9pm on BBC One. Get ready!

angles.name: Who's Watching England
angles.copy: Can England maintain their winning streak? Tuesday night sees them battle Ghana in the World Cup group stage. Who's watching?

moments.title: England's Final World Cup Group Match
moments.blurb: England plays their final FIFA World Cup 2026 group game against Panama on Saturday, June 27th, live on ITV1.

angles.name: England Final Group Game
angles.copy: The last group stage hurdle for England! They face Panama this Saturday at 10pm on ITV1. Will they top the group?

angles.name: Crucial Match
angles.copy: Panama vs England this Saturday – a crucial World Cup match as the Three Lions look to secure their spot in the knockouts. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships kick off on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Wimbledon Build-up
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and incredible tennis! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches on Monday, June 29th.

angles.name: Tennis Excitement
angles.copy: The grass courts are prepped! The world's best tennis players descend on London for Wimbledon, starting in just 10 days.

moments.title: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs tomorrow, June 20th.

angles.name: Longest Day Reminder
angles.copy: Enjoy the light! Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice, giving us the longest day of 2026. How will you make the most of it?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out (hopefully!) for longer tomorrow. It's the Summer Solstice – officially the longest day of the year.

moments.title: Taylor Swift New UK Chart Entry
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's new track 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is a fresh entry in the Official UK Singles Chart Top 40 this week.

angles.name: Swifties Alert
angles.copy: Another week, another Taylor Swift hit! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' just landed in the UK Top 40. Is it your new favourite?

angles.name: Chart New Entry
angles.copy: Swifties, unite! Taylor Swift's latest, 'I Knew It, I Knew You', is making waves in the UK Singles Chart right now.

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of the hugely popular reality show Love Island is currently airing on ITV2, hosted by Maya Jama.

angles.name: Love Island Drama
angles.copy: Are you mugging it off or coupling up? Love Island Season 13 is in full swing on ITV2! Who's your favourite islander so far?

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: Grab your water bottles! Love Island is back and bringing all the drama to ITV2. What's been your favourite moment this series?

moments.title: Toy Story 5 in Cinemas Now
moments.blurb: Disney Pixar's highly anticipated Toy Story 5, featuring Woody and Buzz, was released in UK cinemas yesterday.

angles.name: Family Film Release
angles.copy: He's back! Woody and Buzz return for Toy Story 5, in cinemas now. Who's heading to see it this weekend?

angles.name: Kids Movies
angles.copy: To infinity and beyond! Toy Story 5 is finally here, bringing new adventures to the big screen. A must-see for all ages!

moments.title: Supergirl Flies into Cinemas
moments.blurb: The new DC superhero film Supergirl is set to be released in UK cinemas on Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: Superhero Movie Preview
angles.copy: A new hero arrives! Supergirl makes her solo big-screen debut next Thursday. Are you ready for some super action?

angles.name: DC Release
angles.copy: Get ready for a new DC adventure! Supergirl lands in cinemas on June 25th. Who's excited to see the Woman of Steel?

moments.title: Ann Wilson of Heart's Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary rock vocalist Ann Wilson of Heart turns 76 today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the incredible Ann Wilson of Heart! Still belting out those rock anthems like no other.

angles.name: Heart Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating a true rock icon today! Ann Wilson of Heart turns 76. What's your favourite Heart track?

moments.title: Paula Abdul's Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 64th birthday today.

angles.name: Pop Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Forever our 'Opposites Attract' queen! Happy 64th Birthday to the one and only Paula Abdul.

angles.name: Dance Pop Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating pop icon Paula Abdul's 64th birthday today! What's your favourite track or dance move from her?

moments.title: Gabrielle's Birthday
moments.blurb: Multi-award-winning British singer Gabrielle, known for hits like 'Dreams' and 'Rise', turns 57 today.

angles.name: British Soul Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to the incredible British soul voice, Gabrielle! What's your top track?

angles.name: Dreams Singer
angles.copy: It's Gabrielle's birthday! The 'Dreams' singer turns 57 today. Still sounding as amazing as ever.

moments.title: Lionel Richie's Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, June 20th.

angles.name: Music Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel you're looking for? Happy 77th Birthday to the legend Lionel Richie tomorrow!

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic Lionel Richie's 77th birthday tomorrow! What's your all-time favourite Lionel track?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Returns
moments.blurb: Jeremy Clarkson's hit series Clarkson's Farm is returning for its fifth season on Prime Video this summer.

angles.name: Clarkson's Farm New Season
angles.copy: More chaos, more farming, more Clarkson! Season 5 of Clarkson's Farm is back on Prime Video this summer. Are you ready for Diddly Squat?

angles.name: Diddly Squat
angles.copy: The tractor is revving! Clarkson's Farm Season 5 is hitting Prime Video. What's been your favourite moment from Jeremy's agricultural adventures?

moments.title: The Black Phone 2 on Sky Cinema
moments.blurb: The horror sequel The Black Phone 2, starring Ethan Hawke, is available on Sky Cinema from today, June 19th.

angles.name: Horror Movie Release
angles.copy: If you're brave enough, The Black Phone 2 is out today on Sky Cinema! Get ready for more chills with Ethan Hawke.

angles.name: New Thriller
angles.copy: The phone is ringing again... The Black Phone 2, the highly anticipated horror sequel, is released today on Sky Cinema.

moments.title: USA vs Australia World Cup
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues tonight with USA taking on Australia in a group stage match at 8pm BST on BBC One.

angles.name: World Cup Tonight
angles.copy: Don't miss a minute of the World Cup action tonight! USA clash with Australia at 8pm BST on BBC One.

angles.name: International Match
angles.copy: Group stage drama continues! USA vs Australia is on tonight at 8pm BST. Who are you backing?
